Prontera 164 110

Juno 179 187

8375.name: Gummi Bears
8375.description:
This Gummy Bear is a burst of fruity delight, offering a chewy experience that satisfies your sweet cravings...
Indulge in its sweetness and enhance your focus!
Bonus: +10 HIT for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8376.name: Gooey Gumdrop
8376.description:
This Gooey Gumdrop is a delectable treat, featuring a soft and chewy texture that melts in your mouth...
Experience its delightful sweetness and enjoy enhanced agility to escape any situation!
Bonus: +10 FLEE for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8377.name: Cinnamon Jawbreaker
8377.description:
This Cinnamon Jawbreaker is a fiery fusion of spice and sweetness, offering a long-lasting, flavorful crunch that evolves with every layer...
Unleash your inner strategist and land critical hits with every move!
Bonus: +4 Critical for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8378.name: Hazelnut Nougat
8378.description:
This Hazelnut Nougat is a heavenly blend of creamy nougat and crunchy hazelnuts, creating a rich and satisfying confectionery experience...
Savor its decadence and feel your vitality soar with increased maximum health!
Bonus: +20% MaxHP for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8379.name: N.E.R.D.S.
8379.description:
This N.E.R.D.S. Candy is a colorful explosion of tiny, tangy, crunchy candies that pack a flavor punch in every bite...
Dive into its vibrant taste and boost your spellcasting abilities with increased maximum spell points!
Bonus: +10% MaxSP for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8380.name: Choco-Lollipop
8380.description:
This Choco-Lollipop is a delightful combination of smooth milk chocolate and a playful lollipop shape, making it a sweet indulgence for candy lovers...
Enjoy its deliciousness and gain a slight edge in your attacks with a bonus to your attack power!
Bonus: +2% ATK for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8381.name: Spider Truffle
8381.description:
This Spider Truffle is a mysterious and decadent treat, crafted with precision to resemble an intricate spiderweb, combining rich chocolate and a silky smooth truffle filling...
Delight in its unique flavor and enhance your magical abilities with a bonus to your magical attack power!
Bonus: +2% MAtk for 30 minutes
Type: Confectionery
Weight: 1

8382.name: Halloween Candy Box
8382.description:
